definition:
ἐπίσημος, -ον
 (σῆμα, a mark), [in LXX: Gen.30:42 (קָשַׁר), Est.5:4 8:13, 1Ma.11:37 1Mac 14:48, 2Ma.15:36, 3Ma.6:1 * ;] 
  1. bearing a mark; of money, stamped, coined. 
   2. Metaphorical, 
   (a) in good sense, notable, illustrious: Rom.16:7; 
   (b) in bad sense, notorious: Mat.27:16.†
 (AS)
